name: Jobs To Be Done - Process Variant
what_it_is: Applying JTBD logic to internal processes - "what job is this process hired to do?" to determine if it's solving the right problem or just persisting out of habit.
core_mechanic: "What outcome is this actually supposed to produce?" Then: "Is this process the best way to produce that outcome, or is it a historical artifact?" Separate the job (always valid) from the current solution (possibly outdated).
when_to_use: Optimizing a long-running process that hasn't been questioned / The process works but people resent it / Automation changes the cost structure of alternatives
when_not_to_use: New processes where the job isn't yet clear / Process is clearly fit-for-purpose and you're asking how to improve it
ideaos_application: Agent 3 identifies the job the process is hired to do (distinct from what it currently does), surfaces where the current process over-engineers or under-delivers on that job, proposes a redesign direction.
